mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saf.tn_saf_airprt_fuel ( airprt_cd, rprt_yr, oprtr_id, flt_cnt, flt_time, req_fuel_qty, actl_fuel_qty, yr_non_tanked_qty, yr_tanked_safety_qty, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{airprtId}, #{rprtYr}, #{oprtrId}, #{fltCnt}, #{fltTime}, #{reqFuelQty}, #{actlFuelQty}, #{yrNonTankedQty}, #{yrTankedSafetyQty}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE saf.tn_saf_airprt_fuel SET flt_cnt = #{fltCnt}, flt_time = #{fltTime}, req_fuel_qty = #{reqFuelQty}, actl_fuel_qty = #{actlFuelQty}, yr_non_tanked_qty = #{yrNonTankedQty}, yr_tanked_safety_qty = #{yrTankedSafetyQty}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE airprt_cd = #{airprtId} AND rprt_yr = #{rprtYr} AND oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actl_fuel_qty), 0) FROM saf.tn_saf_airprt_fuel WHERE oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND rprt_yr = #{rprtYr} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
